1240.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sacrificed two horned rams of mixed white and black color, pronouncing the name of Allah and saying Allahu Akbar. I saw him slaughter them with his own hand, placing his foot on their sides.
1240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih dua ekor domba bertanduk berwarna belang putih hitam, sambil menyebut nama Allah dan bertakbir. Aku melihatnya menyembelih keduanya dengan tangannya sendiri, meletakkan kakinya di atas sisi tubuh mereka.

1241.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sacrificed two rams on the day of Eid. When he turned them toward the qiblah he said: 'I have turned my face toward He who created the heavens and the earth, as a Hanif, and I am not of the polytheists. Indeed my prayer, my sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah, Lord of the Worlds. No partner has He, and with this I have been commanded, and I am the first of the Muslims. O Allah, this is from You and for You, on behalf of Muhammad and his nation.' Then he named Allah, said Allahu Akbar, and slaughtered.
1241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih dua ekor domba jantan pada hari raya Idul Adha. Ketika mengarahkan keduanya ke kiblat, beliau bersabda: 'Aku menghadapkan wajahku kepada Yang menciptakan langit dan bumi, sebagai seorang yang hanif, dan aku bukanlah termasuk orang-orang musyrik. Sesungguhnya shalatku, ibadahku, hidupku dan matiku adalah untuk Allah, Rabb semesta alam. Tidak ada sekutu bagi-Nya, dan dengan itulah aku diperintahkan, dan aku adalah orang pertama yang berserah diri. Ya Allah, ini dari-Mu dan untuk-Mu, atas nama Muhammad dan umatnya.' Kemudian beliau menyebut nama Allah, bertakbir, dan menyembelih.

1242.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever intends to sacrifice should not clip his nails or shave any of his hair during the first ten days of Dhul-Hijjah.'
1242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang berniat berkurban, maka janganlah ia memotong kukunya dan jangan mencukur rambutnya sedikitpun selama sepuluh hari pertama bulan Dzulhijjah.'

1243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When the ten days enter and one of you intends to sacrifice, let him not touch any of his hair or nails.'
1243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila sepuluh hari (Dzulhijjah) masuk dan salah seorang dari kalian berniat berkurban, maka janganlah ia menyentuh rambutnya maupun kukunya sedikitpun.'

1244.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara ibn Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked what should be avoided in sacrificial animals. He said: 'Four: the one-eyed animal whose defect is obvious, the lame animal whose lameness is obvious, the sick animal whose sickness is obvious, and the emaciated animal that has no marrow in its bones.'
1244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara' ibn Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang apa yang harus dihindari dalam hewan kurban. Beliau bersabda: 'Empat: hewan yang buta sebelah matanya yang cacatnya tampak jelas, hewan yang pincang yang kepincangannya tampak jelas, hewan yang sakit yang sakitnya tampak jelas, dan hewan yang kurus yang tidak ada sumsumnya.'

1245.iwh_en: Ubayd ibn Fayruz said: I asked al-Bara' about what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited from sacrificial animals. He said: 'Four animals do not suffice: the one-eyed animal whose defect is obvious, the lame animal whose lameness is obvious, the sick animal whose sickness is obvious, and the broken-boned animal that has no marrow.' He said: I said to al-Bara': I dislike defects in the teeth, ear, and horn. He said: Whatever you dislike, leave it, but do not declare it forbidden for anyone.
1245.iwh_id: Ubayd ibn Fayruz berkata: Aku bertanya kepada al-Bara' tentang apa yang dilarang Rasulullah ﷺ dari hewan kurban. Ia berkata: 'Empat hewan tidak mencukupi: hewan yang buta sebelah yang cacatnya jelas, hewan pincang yang kepincangannya jelas, hewan sakit yang sakitnya jelas, dan hewan yang tulangnya patah yang tidak ada sumsumnya.' Dia berkata: Aku berkata kepada al-Bara': Aku tidak suka jika ada cacat pada gigi, telinga, dan tanduk. Ia berkata: Apa yang tidak kamu sukai tinggalkanlah, namun jangan mengharamkannya bagi siapapun.

1246.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked him: O Commander of the Faithful, what about a cow? He said: For seven. I said: What about a broken horn? He said: It does not harm you. He said: I said: What about lameness? He said: When it reaches the place of sacrifice. Then he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to examine the eye and the ear.'
1246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepadanya: Wahai Amirul Mukminin, bagaimana dengan sapi? Ia berkata: Untuk tujuh orang. Aku berkata: Bagaimana dengan tanduk yang patah? Ia berkata: Tidak membahayakanmu. Ia berkata: Aku berkata: Bagaimana dengan pincang? Ia berkata: Jika sudah mencapai tempat penyembelihan. Kemudian ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk memeriksa mata dan telinga.'

1247.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to examine the eye and the ear, and not to sacrifice a muqabalah, mudabarah, kharqa, or shaqqa. The muqabalah is one whose ear tip is cut off; the mudabarah is one cut from the side of the ear; the kharqa is the one with a pierced ear; and the shaqqa is the one with a split ear.'
1247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk memeriksa mata dan telinga, dan tidak berkurban dengan hewan muqabalah, mudabarah, kharqa, atau shaqqa. Muqabalah adalah hewan yang ujung telinganya dipotong; mudabarah adalah yang dipotong dari samping telinga; kharqa adalah yang telinganya ditusuk; dan shaqqa adalah yang telinganya dibelah.'

1248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ distributed sacrificial animals among his Companions and a jadha' fell to my share. I said: O Messenger of Allah, it has become a jadha'ah (young animal) for me. He said: 'Sacrifice it.'
1248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ membagi-bagikan hewan kurban di antara para sahabatnya, dan aku mendapat seekor jadha' (domba muda). Aku berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, yang kudapat adalah jadha'ah. Beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah.'

1249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uqbah ibn Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave me sheep to distribute among my Companions for sacrifice, and a jadha' was left over. I reported it to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he said: 'Sacrifice it yourself.'
1249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uqbah ibn Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ memberiku domba untuk dibagi-bagikan kepada para sahabatku sebagai kurban, dan ada seekor jadha' yang tersisa. Aku melaporkannya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah sendiri.'

1250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever has the means to sacrifice and does not do so, let him not approach our place of prayer.'
1250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang memiliki kemampuan untuk berkurban namun tidak melakukannya, maka janganlah ia mendekati tempat shalat kami.'

1251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not sacrifice except a musinnah (adult animal). Unless it is difficult for you, then sacrifice a jadha' (young sheep).'
1251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian berkurban kecuali dengan musinnah (hewan dewasa). Kecuali jika sulit bagimu, maka sembelihlah jadha' (domba muda).'

1252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not slaughter except a musinnah. If that is difficult, then slaughter a jadha' of sheep.'
1252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian menyembelih kecuali musinnah. Jika itu sulit, maka sembelihlah jadha' dari domba.'

1253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The best sacrifice is a horned ram, and it is better that it be slaughtered on the day of sacrifice.'
1253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Kurban yang paling utama adalah domba jantan bertanduk, dan lebih baik disembelih pada hari raya kurban.'

1254.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sacrifice two horned rams of mixed white and black color. I saw him slaughter them with his own hand, reciting the name of Allah and saying Allahu Akbar, placing his foot on their sides.
1254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyembelih dua ekor domba jantan bertanduk berwarna belang. Aku melihatnya menyembelih keduanya dengan tangannya sendiri, menyebut nama Allah dan bertakbir, sambil meletakkan kakinya di sisi tubuh mereka.

1255.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sacrificed two rams; and he made sacrifice on behalf of those among his nation who were unable to sacrifice.
1255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih dua ekor domba jantan; dan beliau berkurban atas nama orang-orang dari umatnya yang tidak mampu berkurban.

1256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded him to oversee the sacrificial camels, to distribute their meat, hides, and saddlecloths in charity, and not to give the butcher anything from them as payment.
1256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk mengawasi unta-unta kurban, mendistribusikan dagingnya, kulitnya, dan pelananya sebagai sedekah, dan tidak memberikan apapun dari kurban tersebut kepada tukang sembelih sebagai upah.

1257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded me to oversee the sacrificial camels and to give their meat and hides in charity, and not to give anything from them to the butcher.' He said: 'We give him from our own share.'
1257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkanku untuk mengawasi unta-unta kurban dan memberikan daging serta kulitnya sebagai sedekah, dan tidak memberikan apapun dari kurban kepada tukang sembelih.' Ia berkata: 'Kami memberinya dari bagian kami sendiri.'

1258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ sent him to oversee his sacrifice and commanded him to give away its meat, hides, and coverings in charity, and not to give the butcher anything from it.
1258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengutusnya untuk mengawasi kurbannya dan memerintahkannya untuk menyedekahkan daging, kulit, dan pelindungnya, serta tidak memberikan apapun dari kurban kepada tukang sembelih.

1259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Eat, give as charity, and keep in store.'
1259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah.'

1260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ prohibited keeping the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days, then he later permitted it.
1260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari, kemudian beliau mengizinkannya.

1261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O people of Madinah, do not eat the meat of sacrifice beyond three days.' Then the people came to him and he said: 'Eat, give in charity, and store it, for a time of hardship came last year and I wanted you to feed those in need, but now times have eased, so eat, give charity, and store.'
1261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai penduduk Madinah, janganlah kalian memakan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari.' Kemudian orang-orang datang kepadanya dan beliau bersabda: 'Makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah, karena tahun lalu ada masa kesulitan dan aku ingin kalian memberi makan orang-orang yang membutuhkan, tetapi sekarang keadaan sudah lapang, maka makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah.'

1262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Eat from the sacrificial meat, store it, and give charity from it.'
1262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah dari daging kurban, simpanlah, dan bersedekahlah darinya.'

1263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I had forbidden you from visiting graves, but now visit them. I had forbidden you from keeping the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days, but now keep it as long as you wish. I had forbidden you from nabidh (date wine) except in a waterskin, but now drink from all vessels, but do not drink anything intoxicating.'
1263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Buraydah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku pernah melarang kalian berziarah kubur, namun sekarang ziarahlah. Aku pernah melarang kalian menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari, namun sekarang simpanlah selama yang kalian kehendaki. Aku pernah melarang kalian membuat nabidh kecuali dalam wadah kulit, namun sekarang minumlah dari semua bejana, tetapi jangan meminum sesuatu yang memabukkan.'

1264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited eating the meat of sacrificial animals after three days.'
1264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang memakan daging kurban setelah tiga hari.'

1265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he used to eat of the sacrificial meat for three days and then prohibit it. He was asked about it and said: 'I had the opportunity to do so, and one who has the means should not exceed what is sufficient.'
1265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia biasa memakan daging kurban selama tiga hari kemudian melarangnya. Ia ditanya tentang itu dan berkata: 'Aku mendapat kesempatan untuk melakukan itu, dan orang yang memiliki kemampuan tidak boleh melebihi apa yang cukup.'

1266.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Eat the meat of your sacrificial animals for three days.' Then Jabir said: We returned to Madinah and someone told him this was from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, so he said: 'I thought it sufficient that we eat for three days.'
1266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Makanlah daging kurban kalian selama tiga hari.' Kemudian Jabir berkata: Kami kembali ke Madinah dan seseorang memberitahunya bahwa ini dari Rasulullah ﷺ, maka ia berkata: 'Aku pikir cukup bagi kami makan selama tiga hari.'

1267.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man from the Companions of the Prophet ﷺ said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade keeping the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days. After that, he said that it may be stored. Tawus asked: Why did he forbid it at first? He said: The daffah (people in need) came that year, so he wanted the people to feed them.
1267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki dari para sahabat Nabi ﷺ bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari. Setelah itu, beliau bersabda bahwa ia boleh disimpan. Thawus bertanya: Mengapa beliau melarangnya pada awalnya? Ia berkata: Daffah (orang-orang yang membutuhkan) datang pada tahun itu, sehingga beliau ingin orang-orang memberi makan mereka.

1268.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: We used to preserve the trotters of sacrificial animals so that the Prophet ﷺ would eat from them after fifteen days. I asked: What made you do that? She said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not used to eat the meat of sacrificial animals for more than three days. Then he said: 'Eat, give charity, and store.'
1268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: Kami biasa mengawetkan kaki-kaki hewan kurban agar Nabi ﷺ dapat memakannya setelah lima belas hari. Aku bertanya: Apa yang mendorongmu melakukan itu? Ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ dahulu tidak memakan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah.'

1269.iwh_en: It was narrated that Nubayshah al-Khair (may Allah be pleased with him) said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'We had forbidden you from eating the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days so that you might have abundance. Now Allah has given abundance, so eat, store, and give charity. Truly these days are the days of eating, drinking, and remembrance of Allah.'
1269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nubayshah al-Khair (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kami pernah melarang kalian memakan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari agar kalian memiliki kecukupan. Sekarang Allah telah memberikan kecukupan, maka makanlah, simpanlah, dan bersedekahlah. Sesungguhnya hari-hari ini adalah hari-hari makan, minum, dan mengingat Allah.'

1270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ slaughtered the sacrificial animal with his own hand after the prayer on the day of sacrifice, saying: 'In the name of Allah, this is from me and from those of my nation who were unable to sacrifice.'
1270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih hewan kurban dengan tangannya sendiri setelah shalat pada hari raya kurban, seraya bersabda: 'Dengan nama Allah, ini dariku dan dari orang-orang dari umatku yang tidak mampu berkurban.'

1271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not slaughter except a musinnah, unless musinnah is unavailable, in which case slaughter a jadha' of sheep.'
1271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian menyembelih kecuali musinnah, kecuali jika musinnah tidak tersedia, dalam hal itu sembelihlah jadha' dari domba.'

1272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever can afford to sacrifice but does not sacrifice, let him not come near our place of prayer.'
1272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang mampu berkurban namun tidak berkurban, maka janganlah ia mendekati tempat shalat kami.'

1273.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade eating the meat of sacrificial animals after three days. Abu Said said: I held back from eating it. Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was told about that, so he said: 'I had forbidden it because of the daffah that came to you, but now eat, give charity, and store.'
1273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang memakan daging kurban setelah tiga hari. Abu Said berkata: Aku menahan diri dari memakannya. Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ diberitahu tentang hal itu, beliau bersabda: 'Aku pernah melarangnya karena daffah yang datang kepada kalian, tetapi sekarang makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah.'

1274.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abd al-Rahman ibn Khalid said: I heard Nafi inform Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited keeping the meat of sacrificial animals beyond three days. So Ibn Umar said: 'It is true.' He said: Even now? He said: 'Even now.' His son objected, saying: But you yourself sometimes store it. He said: 'But I do not eat it.'
1274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abd al-Rahman ibn Khalid berkata: Aku mendengar Nafi memberitahu Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang menyimpan daging kurban lebih dari tiga hari. Maka Ibn Umar berkata: 'Itu benar.' Ia berkata: Bahkan sekarang? Ia berkata: 'Bahkan sekarang.' Putranya membantah, berkata: Tapi kamu sendiri terkadang menyimpannya. Ia berkata: 'Tapi aku tidak memakannya.'

1275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ commanded them on the day of sacrifice to slaughter with the sword.
1275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan mereka pada hari raya kurban untuk menyembelih dengan pedang.

1276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The days of slaughter are three.' And he used to say: 'The best of days with Allah is the day of sacrifice.'
1276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hari-hari penyembelihan adalah tiga hari.' Dan beliau biasa berkata: 'Hari yang paling utama di sisi Allah adalah hari raya kurban.'

1277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Prophet ﷺ prayed the prayer on the day of sacrifice with us, then he addressed us and commanded us to slaughter quickly, saying: 'Whoever slaughters before the prayer, let him slaughter again.'
1277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Nabi ﷺ shalat bersama kami pada hari raya kurban, kemudian beliau berkhutbah kepada kami dan memerintahkan kami untuk segera menyembelih, seraya bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menyembelih sebelum shalat, maka hendaklah ia menyembelih lagi.'

1278.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara ibn Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The first thing we begin with on this day of ours is prayer, then we return and slaughter. Whoever does this has followed our Sunnah. And whoever slaughtered before prayer, that is meat he brought forward for his family and is nothing of the sacrifice.'
1278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara' ibn Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hal pertama yang kami mulai pada hari ini adalah shalat, kemudian kami pulang dan menyembelih. Barangsiapa yang melakukan ini maka ia telah mengikuti sunnah kami. Dan barangsiapa yang menyembelih sebelum shalat, maka itu adalah daging yang ia persiapkan untuk keluarganya dan bukan bagian dari kurban sama sekali.'

1279.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara ibn Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) that his uncle Abu Burdah sacrificed before the prayer. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Your goat is only a goat for meat.' He said: O Messenger of Allah, I have a young she-goat better than a musinnah. He said: 'Sacrifice it, but it will not suffice for anyone after you.'
1279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara' ibn Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa pamannya Abu Burdah menyembelih sebelum shalat. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kambingmu hanyalah kambing untuk daging.' Ia berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, aku punya kambing betina muda yang lebih baik dari musinnah. Beliau bersabda: 'Sembelihlah, tapi itu tidak akan mencukupi bagi siapapun setelahmu.'

1280.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Bara ibn Azib (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the Ansar sacrificed before the prayer. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'Repeat your sacrifice.' He said: O Messenger of Allah, I only have a young she-goat. He said: 'It will suffice you, but will not suffice anyone else.'
1280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Bara' ibn Azib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari Anshar menyembelih sebelum shalat. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Ulangi kurbanmu.' Ia berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, aku hanya punya kambing betina muda. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu cukup bagimu, tapi tidak cukup bagi orang lain.'

1281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about what should be offered as a sacrifice. He said: 'That which is free of defect: neither lame, blind, one-eyed, old, nor extremely thin.'
1281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang apa yang harus dipersembahkan sebagai kurban. Beliau bersabda: 'Yang bebas dari cacat: tidak pincang, tidak buta, tidak cacat sebelah matanya, tidak tua, dan tidak terlalu kurus.'

1282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The udhhiyah (sacrifice) and the aqiqah are prescribed, so sacrifice on behalf of every person.'
1282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Udhhiyah (kurban) dan aqiqah itu disyariatkan, maka berkurbanlah atas nama setiap orang.'

1283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The cow is from seven and the camel is from seven.'
1283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seekor sapi mencukupi tujuh orang dan seekor unta mencukupi tujuh orang.'

1284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: We slaughtered with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at Hudaybiyah; a camel was for seven and a cow was for seven.
1284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Kami menyembelih bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di Hudaybiyah; seekor unta mencukupi tujuh orang dan seekor sapi mencukupi tujuh orang.

1285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I said: O Messenger of Allah, we are meeting the enemy tomorrow and we have no knives. He said: 'Hasten or use what causes the blood to flow and the name of Allah is mentioned over it. Eat it, but do not use a tooth or claw. I will tell you why: the tooth is a bone and the claw is the knife of the Ethiopians.'
1285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi' ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, kami akan bertemu musuh besok dan kami tidak punya pisau. Beliau bersabda: 'Percepatlah atau gunakan apa saja yang mengalirkan darah dan nama Allah disebutkan atasnya. Makanlah, tapi jangan gunakan gigi atau kuku. Aku akan memberitahumu mengapa: gigi adalah tulang dan kuku adalah pisau orang Etiopia.'

1286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that a camel ran away at the time of the Prophet ﷺ and they did not have horses, so a man shot it with an arrow and it stopped. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among these camels are some that are wild like wild animals; if one of them gets away from you, do to it what you would do to a wild animal.'
1286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi' ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seekor unta melarikan diri pada zaman Nabi ﷺ dan mereka tidak punya kuda, maka seorang laki-laki memanahnya dan unta itu berhenti. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara unta-unta ini ada yang liar seperti hewan-hewan liar; jika salah satunya lepas darimu, lakukan padanya apa yang kamu lakukan pada hewan liar.'

1287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaddad ibn Aws (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed Allah has prescribed excellence in all things. So when you kill, kill well, and when you slaughter, slaughter well. Let one of you sharpen his blade and give ease to his slaughtered animal.'
1287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shaddad ibn Aws (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah telah mewajibkan ihsan (berbuat baik) dalam segala sesuatu. Maka apabila kalian membunuh, bunuhlah dengan baik, dan apabila kalian menyembelih, sembelihlah dengan baik. Hendaklah salah seorang dari kalian mengasah pisaunya dan memberi kemudahan kepada hewan yang disembelihnya.'

1288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man put his foot on the neck of a camel while sharpening his knife. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do you want to kill it twice? Why did you not sharpen your knife before you laid it down?'
1288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki meletakkan kakinya di atas leher unta sambil mengasah pisaunya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah kamu ingin membunuhnya dua kali? Mengapa kamu tidak mengasah pisaumu sebelum kamu menidurkannya?'

1289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded that the knives be sharpened and hidden from the animals, and said: 'When one of you slaughters, let him hasten.'
1289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan agar pisau-pisau diasah dan disembunyikan dari hewan, dan bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian menyembelih, hendaklah ia mempercepat.'

1290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited tying up animals and then shooting them with arrows.
1290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang mengikat hewan kemudian memanah mereka.

1291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Prophet ﷺ passed by a man who was dragging a sheep by its ear. He said to him: 'Take it by its ear, not by its ear!' — meaning, take hold of it properly.
1291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Nabi ﷺ melewati seorang laki-laki yang menarik seekor domba dari telinganya. Beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Ambillah dari telinganya, bukan dari telinganya!' — maksudnya, peganlah dengan benar.

1292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by a man who was dragging a sheep by its ear, and the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Leave its ear and take its neck.'
1292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ melewati seorang laki-laki yang menarik seekor domba dari telinganya, maka Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tinggalkan telinganya dan pegang lehernya.'

1293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The aqiqah is prescribed for every child born — slaughter on their behalf and remove harm from them.'
1293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aqiqah disyariatkan untuk setiap anak yang dilahirkan — sembelihlah atas namanya dan hilangkanlah gangguan darinya.'

1294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salman ibn Amir al-Dabbi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'With the boy there is aqiqah, so shed blood on his behalf and remove harm from him.'
1294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salman ibn Amir al-Dabbi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bersama seorang anak laki-laki ada aqiqah, maka tumpahkanlah darah atas namanya dan hilangkanlah gangguan darinya.'
